user.title: Neebo Setup
user.description: Choose how you want to connect to Neebo.

bluetooth.title: Select Neebo Bracelet
bluetooth.description: Select your Neebo monitor from the list.

base_station.title: Select Neebo Base Station
base_station.description: Select your Neebo Base Station (must be powered on and nearby).

base_station_wifi.title: Base Station Configuration
base_station_wifi.description:
Enter your network details to write to the base station via Bluetooth.

**IMPORTANT:** You must add the MQTT User shown below to your Mosquitto Add-on configuration!

data.mqtt_pass: MQTT Password (for the new Mosquitto user)

abort.no_devices_found: No Neebo devices found on the network.
abort.connection_failed: Failed to connect to the base station via Bluetooth.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect, please try again.
